title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Zoro, Unknown person #11, King, Luffy as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: THEY HAVE THIS HUGE GUY WITH THEM!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE THERE WERE CREATURES THIS BIG....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: TO CLEAR YOUR WAY TO THE CASTLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! Don't waste any of your energy here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we were the same as when we fought OARS..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: would have taken all of us working together...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHAT THE HELL IS GOING ON...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the one that should be asking that, X Drake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were the one who helped Tra- Falgar Law Escape, weren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nobody other than you could have done it. What is your objective?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get it now... the person you want to kill is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's you, ya piece of trash!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's shameful to think that someone like you made it this high up!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
